name: Mapa desde HDP (Movil)

steps.name: Click on span "Mostrar en el mapa"

multiLocator.cl: /descendant::*[contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " Button_small__fZ12G ") and contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " Button_text-flat__yB4ME ")]/descendant::*[contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " Typography_bold__KOIhT ")]
multiLocator.clt: /descendant::*[contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " Button_small__fZ12G ") and contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " Button_text-flat__yB4ME ")]/descendant::*[contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " Typography_bold__KOIhT ")]

element.targetOuterHTML: Mostrar en el mapa

steps.name: Click on svg "Madrid, Comunidad de Madrid, ..."

multiLocator.ro: //*[contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " Button_button__3Uvbk ") and contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " Button_small__fZ12G ") and contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " Button_icon-rounded__8_Npm ") and contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " is-absolute ") and contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " top-16 ") and contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " left-16 ") and contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " z-base ") and contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " desktop:is-static ")]/*

element.targetOuterHTML: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="currentColor" data-rotateonrtl="true"><path d="M13.9454 3.99995C14.1454 3.99995 14.4454 4.09995 14.6454 4.19995
